She analyzes the numbers every day.
What do you do? Do you manage a team?
So, Maísa, what do you do exactly?
I work in finance. I manage a small team of three people.
Nice. And what do you do every day?
I analyze the numbers and I write a report for my manager.
Do you work with clients, too?
Yes, I do. I am responsible for two big clients.
That is a lot. Do you have many tasks?
Yes, I do. I always have a deadline, but I like my job.
You are very organized. Does your team use spreadsheets?
Yes, we do. My spreadsheet is my best friend at work!
Every day, I analyze the numbers.
I write a report for my manager.
I am responsible for two big clients.
I always have a deadline, but I like my job.

Hi! I am David. I work in finance, too. Every day, I talk to clients. I analyze their numbers and I write reports for them. I manage a small team of three people. I am responsible for the big accounts. I have many tasks, and I always have a deadline. But I like my job a lot. Numbers are my world. What about you? What do you do?

Good morning. My name is Paula. I am an analyst on the finance team. I start my day at nine. First, I check my email. Then I open my spreadsheet and I analyze the numbers. At eleven, we have a meeting. In the afternoon, I write a report for my manager. I am responsible for two clients. My work is busy, but I love it. Every day is different.
Hello! My name is Maisa. I work in finance. I manage a small team. I analyze reports every day.
